text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and I have a track reserved for
afternoon practice, but there's suddenly an
unforeseen downpour.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Look, Big Brother! It's raining cats and dogs!
Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Look, Big Sister! It's raining cats and dogs!
Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You said you wanted me to train on a soft track,
right?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You said you wanted me to train on a soft track,
right?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So I thought if I wished for sunny weather... it
would probably rain instead!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I hung up tons of sunshine dolls in my room and
wished for it to be sunny every day!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And now, look at the weather! At this rate, the
track will be soft by the afternoon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While it's hard to say if this is really something to
celebrate, Rice's happiness makes it easy to
overlook.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In the afternoon...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no way...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the rain from this morning has dried up! The
track is firm again!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I guess I should have known better than to expect
things to work out my way...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her enthusiasm is plummeting like a rock! At this
rate...
choice_data_list: Let's take advantage of the sunshine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her enthusiasm is plummeting like a rock! At this
rate...
choice_data_list: Let's take advantage of the sunshine.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Now?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What a big voice you have, Big Brother!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What a big voice you have, Big Sister!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-right!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um... R-raaain! FAAALL!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Really? I-I never shout like this. It's honestly a
little embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-but it's kinda fun too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue to do voice training on the empty
track by screaming at the sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's exhausting, but at least it keeps Rice Shower's
spirits high.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Take advantage of the sunshine? What do you
mean?
choice_data_list: Let's practice on the track while it's firm!
Let's practice on the track while it's firm!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-is it really okay to change our plans?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You're right, though... The track does look perfect.
choice_data_list: That's it! Let's look on the bright side.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Look on... the bright side...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're right. The sunshine feels so good!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I want to start training right now!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I want to start training right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower's motivation rises once more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She makes good use of the firm track for the rest
of the day's training.
